item.title: Jadestone boosts Malaysia offshore oil production
item.description: Infill drilling campaign delivers for AIM-listed independent

item.title: UK-based oil and gas company accepts Israeli takeover offer
item.description: Pharos (formerly Soco International) accepts cash offer from Ratio Petroleum

item.title: Saipem selling jack-up rigs to focus on deepwater sector
item.description: Fleet in the transaction covers three owned jack-ups and two leased rigs

item.title: Adnoc closing in on commercial shale oil and gas
item.description: Representatives of the national oil company told industry peers its 10-year path toward unconventionals is almost complete

item.title: Independent in market for new West Africa FLNG vessel
item.description: Trident Energy pushing ahead with new liquefaction scheme

item.title: SBM and Solstad select yard for next-generation deepwater vessel
item.description: China's CIMC Raffles to build multipurpose installation vessel

item.title: Denison makes major gas discovery onshore Australia's East Coast
item.description: Battle Creek a boost to Queensland's energy security

item.title: Woodside's Browse LNG project facing public scrutiny
item.description: Australian Conservation Foundation's recommendation for reconsideration accepted by Environment Ministry

item.title: Chevron worked for years on turbine orders for power project with Microsoft
item.description: US supermajor’s new energies leader said talks with GE Vernova on critical equipment began at least two years before Project Kilby announcement

item.title: Devon Energy CEO sees favourable conditions for swift asset sales
item.description: Clay Gaspar notes strong buyer’s market as reason for possible accelerated timeline

item.title: Petrobras and Pemex sign cooperation deal for Gulf of Mexico
item.description: Companies to assess collaboration in upstream and industrial processes

item.title: BP appoints new chief of staff
item.description: Ann Davies to officially start new role in coming weeks

item.title: Enhanced oil recovery provides opportunity for US carbon capture projects
item.description: Drive for production efficiency in US oil and gas creating market for captured carbon dioxide

item.title: Chinese yard scoops FPSO contract for Angola project
item.description: PAJ project offshore Angola was sanctioned on Monday

item.title: Saipem starts operations for Suriname's first major offshore project
item.description: Company to use Normand Navigator vessel for installation campaign at GranMorgu

item.title: Baker Hughes secures contract for Nigerian gas project
item.description: The ANOH gas processing plant will have a capacity of 600 million cubic feet per day

item.title: Santos delivers at Alaska oil project
item.description: Crude continuously flowing at Pikka Phase 1

item.title: No pasta and plastic cutlery threat to Woodside’s offshore workers
item.description: Catering staff on several Woodside offshore facilities set to vote on industrial action

item.title: Petrobras welcomes bids in multibillion-dollar vessel tender
item.description: Brazilian company could disburse up to $2 billion in long-term PLSV charter agreements

item.title: Norway drilling hit by offshore strike
item.description: Norwegian Union of Energy Workers (SAFE) members strike after wage talks end without agreement

item.title: Fragmentation continues to shape CCS landscape: WoodMac
item.description: Sector advancing unevenly amid mix of regional policies, market conditions and external risks

item.title: Gas flaring is rising again, and fast, says World Bank
item.description: Volume of gas flared worldwide in 2025 was the highest since 2019 and worth some $54 billion

item.title: Aker BP and partners preparing to start key exploration well
item.description: Alpehumle is located in the Gjoa area

item.title: Former chief executive of Chinese state-owned giant given suspended death sentence
item.description: Yuan Guangyu, former chief executive of CNOOC Limited and COSL, was convicted of taking bribes

item.title: Azule hits market with deepwater rig inquiry
item.description: Drilling unit needed for work in four blocks in Angola

item.title: HCML advancing Madura Strait EPCI tender
item.description: Operator pulling out the stops to have MDK gas field on stream in 2028

item.title: Platform deal finalised for Conrad's Mako gas development
item.description: Duta Marine/Pakarti Tirtoagung will supply leased mobile offshore production unit

item.title: Full production resumes after Ichthys LNG strike action halted
item.description: Inpex's 9.3 million tonnes per annum project in Australia meets 10% of Japan's demand

item.title: Third time’s the charm for Murphy Oil’s latest exploration well off Ivory Coast
item.description: US operator’s Bubale-1X well hits 30 metres of net oil pay

item.title: Third time’s the charm for Murphy Oil’s wildcatting offshore Ivory Coast
